query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "kvarn: variance-normalized kv-cache quantization mitigates error accum" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it directly measures the same mechanism (KV-cache quantization) and domain (Large Language Models) as the user's question, specifically addressing the error accumulation and memory challenges associated with quantizing the Key/Value cache, which is the core subject of the referenced "KVarN" work.
